name: Pepper Steak Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Beef round steak, cut into 1-1/2 x 1/4 inch strips
1 medium Red or green pepper, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine picante sauce, water, soy sauce, cornstarch, and ginger in a small bowl; set aside.
2. In a large skillet or wok over high heat, heat 2 tablespoons of the oil until hot but not smoking.
3. Add meat and stir-fry 1 to 2 minutes; remove with a slotted spoon and set aside.
4. If necessary, drain any excess oil from the skillet.
5. Heat remaining tablespoon of oil in the skillet.
6. Add peppers, mushrooms, onions, and garlic to the skillet; stir-fry for 3 minutes.
7. Return meat to the skillet.
8. Stir in the picante sauce mixture and pour into the skillet. Cook and stir for about 1 minute or until the sauce thickens.
9. Serve over rice with additional picante sauce. Makes 4 servings.
